message: jx3r4 verify provisioning certificate issuer chain

files.patch:
@@ -54,6 +54,7 @@ tracing.workspace = true
 bytes.workspace = true
 hex.workspace = true
 base64.workspace = true
+x509-parser = { version = "0.18.1", features = ["verify"] }
 
 [target.'cfg(unix)'.dependencies]
 # NTP client for time validation (Unix systems)
